horoscope: Today's transits support taking an honest look at what needs improving, dear Aries. This is a time for recognizing weak or vulnerable areas of your life so that you know, in no uncertain terms, what needs strengthening going forward. There is terrific energy with you for collaborations or the power of teamwork with today's Sun-Pluto harmonious aspect. Someone who has been uncommunicative might now open up, or you can learn something valuable that helps you solve a long-standing problem or leads to a greater understanding of a situation. Small changes made now can have a significant impact on the future. Friendships, causes, or shared personal goals can be the glue that helps hold everything together, but this is also a fine time for looking within for answers.

The current solar cycle calls for more rest, processing, and reflecting, dear Taurus. You see the events of the past year in a new light, helping you flush out the negative elements before beginning fresh. Today's Sun aspects help you with this process, first by encouraging you to see things more realistically, and then by revealing areas that you can improve. You might reach a level of peace about a past matter. While you may have been feeling pressure to move forward with your business, you can appreciate the importance of strategy and patience today. You might gain new insight regarding your career or true path. You can more easily identify areas of waste so you can work to eliminate them. You're more interested in those things with the potential for long-term rewards. This can be a time for making important adjustments to your life that help you find a better balance between work and downtime.

Today's strong for focusing on what you know and what you know you can control, dear Gemini, and take things step by step. It's also a strong time for connecting. You can learn something new about a friendship or personal project today as the Sun harmonizes with Pluto. You might enjoy some support or cooperation from others. It's a time to recognize new ways to improve your life, and you're ready to take on a challenge. Your viewpoint is expanding through your experiences with the people in your life or networks. Sharing personal perspectives can bring new insights into your world and increased enjoyment and pleasure from life. Idea exchanges can be helpful, leading to more informed decisions. Transits today help you feel reinforced through your connections, making it a good time to revitalize a friendship.

You might assume more responsibilities and feel the accompanying loss of freedom now, dear Cancer, but you may very well appreciate the clarity that comes from seeing things realistically. People might recognize your accomplishments, or they might temporarily see the flaws. It's an important week for establishing your priorities. Taking a hard look at things might be necessary, or you could feel temporarily disappointed before refueling with the motivation to improve. Today's Sun-Pluto aspect helps you draw on patience and benefit from it. You're more inclined to face matters than to procrastinate and leave them for another day. You can feel empowered by meeting your responsibilities and stretching yourself a little further to exceed your goals. You have the foresight to invest your efforts in a long-term endeavor rather than waste your energy on short-term satisfaction. An opportunity to gain a competitive edge or a referral can emerge now.

You're at an important juncture for reassessing goals and recognizing your priorities, dear Leo. You might recognize the need to concentrate, focus, and specialize — it's a time to add more structure to your life by setting reasonable yet firmer goals. Today's transits are also strong for gaining a better understanding of a friend or your social needs. You might enjoy a new perspective, or someone might reawaken an interest in you. Sharing viewpoints, personal philosophies, and opinions, and making exciting discoveries can lift your spirits. It's exciting to break through a learning ceiling or improve a bond with someone special. Aiming for more patience, attentiveness, or understanding with one another can be most rewarding. It's easier to cut through the fluff and get to the root of issues today. Pacing yourself can be the key to success, but it's also important to stretch your mind and open yourself to new possibilities.

Today's transits boost your ability to concentrate and focus, dear Virgo. A chance to repair a relationship or discover a satisfying solution or method with work or health can be in the spotlight. You're fascinated with the depths of situations, people, and topics, and your own powers of persuasion and leadership increase. Support or backing can be available. It's a great time to devise strategies and make plans, pool your resources, and combine your talents with someone. A competitive edge, boost, or opening can figure strongly now. You're deepening your understanding or your sense of purpose. It's a day for shuffling your priorities, and this applies in general to the week.

Today's transits remind you of the need to focus your energies, dear Libra. New insight into a relationship or passion project can figure strongly. You're in excellent shape for observing and strategizing, but connecting and collaborating can be worthwhile now as well. Others appreciate your discretion and understanding. If you need to heal or repair a relationship, or your attitudes toward relating, you seem to have the tools to do so. While it's a time for acknowledging deep feelings, you also see the value of patience and timing today. It's a good day to work on honing a skill, perfecting a craft, or putting extra effort into a heartfelt project, special activity, or hobby. It's a fine time for gaining strength and conviction. You might aim to tap into your inner power and use it to help others or to let them know they're important to you. Seeing things realistically can help you in the long run, as you're then in a place to make more informed choices.

Today's transits are strong for working hard and doing what you can, dear Scorpio, without pushing yourself too hard. It's time to recognize and follow the rules, but you're also ready to build and grow. Today's Sun-Pluto aspect is particularly helpful for concentration and focus. It reminds you that using strategy in your life can be enriching. It's a good time to find something lost, or you might gain new information, solve problems, and get to the bottom of matters. Improving home life, daily routines, and family relationships can be part of the picture. Eliminating clutter might be a drive now as you more readily see those things that have outworn their purpose. With work, routines, and even health, you have a magic touch--you're ready and willing to transform things for the better. At the same time, you're seeing these areas of life more realistically. Information coming in can give you confidence and clarity, or perhaps an edge. You're turning difficulties into opportunities now.

Today's transits first boost your clarity, and then your confidence, dear Sagittarius. They remind you that employing a strategy or drawing on patience can give you an advantage from time to time. Looking at things with more realism is important now. You might gain an edge with communications, love matters, or creative pursuits. You could learn something new, see an issue in a new light, or gain a clearer sense of your priorities, which, in turn, improves your focus. You're motivated to make a difference or accomplish something important to you. Someone special might appreciate you for your more unique qualities. Working hard at learning, creative, or mental tasks can bring rewards down the road.

You'll feel stronger if you meet your obligations today, dear Capricorn, and it's a good idea to start small and go from there. With today's transits, you feel more confident if you see things realistically, but you also approach problems in a new way, finding it easier to arrive at solutions. Discovering ways to improve your life, particularly in your home life or with money, can be in focus. Small changes you make now can bring great rewards down the road. It's a particularly good time to streamline and downsize, which can happen through decluttering or reworking your current resources to your advantage. On another level, changing your view of yourself or letting go of negative thoughts and limiting attitudes can be useful now. Gaining a deeper understanding of your financial situation, family relationships, and your expectations and fears can be in a positive spotlight.

Seeing things realistically is the tendency today, dear Aquarius, and can lead to opportunities. There's a productive theme, and it's excellent for communications and strategies. You can produce some fine work now, and you can benefit from both inner motivation and external reinforcement. Whether you take on new challenges or improve what you already have going, the focus should be on self-improvement and control. A new approach to an old problem can be appealing and successful. Your ideas are well-received, and you can be especially persuasive. It’s a good time to pitch an idea or have a conversation that means a lot to you. People are showing their respect for you, and you could make small advances in or improvements to your projects.

Today's transits support working on one problem at a time, step by step, dear Pisces. Financial obligations have their way of making themselves known. Instead of worrying excessively, aim to do whatever you can to meet them and resolve to get organized. You're well-supported for this task! You're in good shape for drawing up plans and strategies, particularly regarding money and business matters with today's Sun-Pluto transit. It's a fine time to be patient to your advantage. You might gain new insight into psychological and personal affairs, and narrowing your focus seems to work best at the moment. Seeing a new layer to a situation helps you make better decisions and feel stronger. Transits occurring now support positive lifestyle changes.
